g.text: Local and remote under the same rules

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif
text.tspan: and mixed compare runs that do not quietly
give the hosted model an unfair advantage.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: Trace the workflow, not just the answer

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif
text.tspan: Replay prompts, inspect patch review steps,
open file-level evidence, and see where a
run stalled between gateway and tool calls.

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif
SF Pro Display, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: Local runtime ops are part of the product

text.font-family: SF Pro Text, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif
text.tspan: Prewarm, release, restart, view logs, and
watch recovery actions while benchmark runs
instead of guessing from a dead progress bar.
